summary: Comprehensive testing of Ops Management App completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Admin Dashboard (5 cards - Deployments, Live Dashboard, Inventory, Requests, Admin Panel - NO Actions), Deployment Manager Dashboard (5 cards - including Actions - NO Admin Panel), Deployments calendar working, Live Dashboard showing simplified stats (Total Hours, Shifts Completed, Hours per BnB), End Shift form enforces mandatory SSD_used and activity_type fields.

issues: Console warning: Duplicate React keys for Camera-01 items in SSD dropdown - may cause rendering issues
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility issue

action_items: MINOR: Fix duplicate React keys in items dropdown (Camera-01 appearing multiple times)
MINOR: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Role-based dashboard views correctly implemented: Admin sees 5 cards (no Actions), Manager sees 5 cards (no Admin Panel)
Live Dashboard returns simplified structure: {date, total_hours, total_shifts, per_bnb, recent_events}
End Shift form correctly enforces mandatory ssd_used and activity_type fields with client-side validation
Calendar-based Deployments page working with day selection and deployment creation
Admin Panel has proper tabs for Users, BnBs, Kits, Items, Deployments management
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up DeployTestUser (deployment_manager) for testing role-based views
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Auth (Admin login), Role-based dashboards (Admin vs deployment_manager), Deployments calendar, Live Dashboard (simplified stats), Admin Panel (user management), Actions page with mandatory End Shift fields. Minor console warnings for duplicate React keys and missing DialogContent descriptions.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns status ok
Backend: Admin login with Admin/admin123 credentials
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected with 401
Backend: /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Backend: /api/dashboard/live returns simplified structure (date, total_hours, total_shifts, per_bnb, recent_events)
Backend: Live dashboard requires authentication
Backend: Get users list
Backend: Create deployment_manager user
Backend: Get BnBs list
Backend: Create BnB
Backend: Get kits list
Backend: Create kit
Backend: Get deployments list
Backend: Create deployment with BnB, shift, manager, kits
Backend: shift_end event accepts ssd_used and activity_type
Backend: shift_start event
Backend: Protected endpoints require authentication
Frontend: Login page loads with credentials hint
Frontend: Admin login successful
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Deployments, Live Dashboard, Inventory, Requests, Admin Panel cards
Frontend: Admin Dashboard does NOT show Actions card (correct)
Frontend: Deployments page calendar renders with month navigation
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows Total Hours Logged card
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows Shifts Completed card
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows Hours per BnB section
Frontend: Admin Panel loads with Users tab
Frontend: Deployment Manager login successful
Frontend: Deployment Manager Dashboard shows Actions card
Frontend: Deployment Manager Dashboard does NOT show Admin Panel (correct)
Frontend: Actions page shows 5 action buttons (Start Shift, End Shift, Transfer Item, Report Damage, Request Item)
Frontend: End Shift dialog shows SSD Used * (required)
Frontend: End Shift dialog shows Activity Type * (required)
Frontend: End Shift validation shows 'SSD used is required' error on empty submit
features_verified: Admin Dashboard: 5 cards visible (Deployments, Live Dashboard, Inventory, Requests, Admin Panel), NO Actions
Deployment Manager Dashboard: 5 cards visible (Deployments, Actions, Live Dashboard, Inventory, Requests), NO Admin Panel
Deployments page: Calendar interface with month navigation, day selection, deployment details
Live Dashboard: Simplified stats showing Total Hours Logged and Shifts Completed
Live Dashboard: Hours per BnB section with per-location breakdown
Admin Panel: User management with Create user dialog (Name, Role, Password)
Actions page: End Shift requires mandatory SSD_used and activity_type fields
